# env-manifest-001: Manifest-driven services/tests/logs runtime

## description
Use manifest services/tests/logs commands to seed runtime hooks and pane command files.

## current implementation state
- Implemented through manifest-to-runtime config mapping plus workspace bootstrap command files.

## implementation plan
1. Completed: services mapped into hook runtime.
2. Completed: tests/logs commands seed command files.
3. Completed: migration fallback to legacy project config.
